name: fluidmetronome
description: Starter template for a Progressive Web App metronome aimed at uneven rhythmic structures common in Swedish folk traditions, including patterns built from variable step lengths rather than only uniform beats.

scripts.test:browser: node tests/browser/layout.mjs chromium && node tests/browser/column-menu.mjs chromium
scripts.test:webkit: node tests/browser/layout.mjs webkit && node tests/browser/column-menu.mjs webkit
scripts.test: npm run test:audio && npm run test:browser
